description:
What: When the surrounding cont's dst is VecI64, lower MakeVec to 'write elements directly into dst payload' instead of 'alloc, fill, return pointer'.

Why: Proves DPS extends past Struct/tuple to vector kinds.

CLIF impact: strict reduction: removes one alloc and one mov per MakeVec callsite that is destinationized.

Removes: per-call vec alloc when destinationized.

Tests: golden CLIF on a small vec-builder fn fixture.
title: fz-dps.D2: DPS for MakeVec(VecI64, ...)
